__package__.yml.rawContents:
types:
  Component: unknown
  Components: map<string, Component>
  EntityResponse:
    properties:
      id: optional<string>
      name: optional<string>
      components: optional<Components>
      maskedComponent:
        type: optional<Component>
        docs: The component value.
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml

maskedComponent.docs: The json component value that contains the field being overridden.

entities.yml.rawContents:
imports:
  root: __package__.yml
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    getEntities:
      path: /entities
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      display-name: Get entities
      response:
        docs: Entities retrieved successfully
        type: root.EntityResponse
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - response:
            body:
              id: id
              name: name
              components:
                key:
                  key: value
              maskedComponent:
                key: value
    createEntity:
      path: /entities
      method: POST
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      display-name: Create entity
      request:
        name: CreateEntityRequest
        body:
          properties:
            name: optional<string>
            maskedComponent:
              type: optional<root.Component>
              docs: >-
                The json component value that contains the field being
                overridden.
        content-type: application/json
      response:
        docs: Entity created successfully
        type: root.EntityResponse
        status-code: 200
      examples:
        - request: {}
          response:
            body:
              id: id
              name: name
              components:
                key:
                  key: value
              maskedComponent:
                key: value
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Empty Schema API
